content:
> Subject: JCB 3TS - available now, here's what we can do
>
> Hi [customer name],
>
> Great speaking with you. As discussed, I've located a JCB 3TS available now that we can get to you quickly.
>
> Options:
> - Cash: small discount on list price
> - Finance: 0% for 48 months (subject to approval)
>
> Let me know how you'd like to proceed and I'll reserve this unit for you today.
>
> [Your name]

*Short and specific. The customer is already warm - this confirms and creates the paper trail.*
